creator: Rebecca Bellan
title: (No AI) It’s official: The Pentagon has labeled Anthropic a supply chain risk
dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan
content: The Department of Defense has officially labeled Anthropic a supply chain risk, making the AI firm the first American company with the label. Meanwhile, the DOD continues to use Anthropic's AI in Iran.
contentSnippet: The Department of Defense has officially labeled Anthropic a supply chain risk, making the AI firm the first American company with the label. Meanwhile, the DOD continues to use Anthropic's AI in Iran.

creator: Rebecca Bellan
title: (No AI) EXCLUSIVE: Luma launches creative AI agents powered by its new ‘Unified Intelligence’ models
dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan
content: Luma introduced Luma Agents, powered by its new “Unified Intelligence” models, designed to coordinate multiple AI systems and generate end-to-end creative work across text, images, video and audio.
contentSnippet: Luma introduced Luma Agents, powered by its new “Unified Intelligence” models, designed to coordinate multiple AI systems and generate end-to-end creative work across text, images, video and audio.

title: (No AI) Netflix is buying Ben Affleck’s AI startup
author: Charles Pulliam-Moore
content:
![Actor Ben Affleck in a suit.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/03/gettyimages-2256155551.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Though [Netflix lost the war for Warner Bros.](https://www.theverge.com/streaming/885753/netflix-exit-warner-bros-discovery-deal-paramount), it has just bought an AI startup from [the internet's favorite Dunkin' Donuts aficionado](https://www.theverge.com/news/864107/ben-affleck-says-smart-things-about-ai).

Today, Netflix announced that it has acquired InterPositive, Ben Affleck's AI company that specializes in tools for film and television production. The deal will see all 16 of InterPositive's current team of engineers and researchers move over to Netflix. Affleck is also set to join the streamer as a senior adviser.

In [a statement about the acquisition](https://about.netflix.com/en/news/why-interpositive-is-joining-netflix) and his reasons for founding InterPositive in 2022, Affleck said he was inspired to get into the tech space after "observing the early rise of AI in producti …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/streaming/889973/netflix-ben-affleck-interpositive-ai)

Though Netflix lost the war for Warner Bros., it has just bought an AI startup from the internet's favorite Dunkin' Donuts aficionado.
Today, Netflix announced that it has acquired InterPositive, Ben Affleck's AI company that specializes in tools for film and television production. The deal will see all 16 of InterPositive's current team of engineers and researchers move over to Netflix. Affleck is also set to join the streamer as a senior adviser.
In a statement about the acquisition and his reasons for founding InterPositive in 2022, Affleck said he was inspired to get into the tech space after "observing the early rise of AI in producti …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) OpenAI’s new GPT-5.4 model is a big step toward autonomous agents
author: Emma Roth
content:
![Vector illustration of the Chat GPT logo.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/chorus/uploads/chorus_asset/file/25462046/STK155_OPEN_AI_CVirginia_2_C.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

OpenAI [is launching GPT-5.4](https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5-4/), the latest version of its AI model that the company says combines advancements in reasoning, coding, and professional work involving spreadsheets, documents, and presentations. It's also OpenAI's first model with native computer use capabilities, meaning it can operate a computer on your behalf and complete tasks across different applications.

The new model is a step toward [the agentic future that AI companies](https://www.theverge.com/the-stepback-newsletter/767376/ai-agents-jarvis-what-can-they-do) are aiming to build, where a network of AI-powered agents operates in the background to complete complex jobs online and within software. OpenAI [introduced ChatGPT Agent](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/709158/openai-new-release-chatgpt-agent-operator-deep-research) amid a [flurry of other](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/828003/anthropics-new-claude-opus-4-5-model-ai-agents-cybersecurity) [agentic tool …](https://www.theverge.com/news/821948/microsoft-windows-11-ai-agents-taskbar-integration)

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/889926/openai-gpt-5-4-model-release-ai-agents)

It's also OpenAI's first model with native computer use capabilities, meaning it can operate a computer on your behalf and complete tasks across different applications.
The new model is a step toward the agentic future that AI companies are aiming to build, where a network of AI-powered agents operates in the background to complete complex jobs online and within software. OpenAI introduced ChatGPT Agent amid a flurry of other agentic tool …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) Introducing GPT-5.4

title: (No AI) Reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, and that’s good
content: OpenAI introduces CoT-Control and finds reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, reinforcing monitorability as an AI safety safeguard.
contentSnippet: OpenAI introduces CoT-Control and finds reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, reinforcing monitorability as an AI safety safeguard.

creator: Miles Klee
title: (No AI) Grammarly Is Offering ‘Expert’ AI Reviews From Your Favorite Authors—Dead or Alive
dc:creator: Miles Klee
content: The tool, offered by the recently-rebranded company Superhuman, gives feedback based on the work of famous dead and living writers—without their permission.
contentSnippet: The tool, offered by the recently-rebranded company Superhuman, gives feedback based on the work of famous dead and living writers—without their permission.
